description: Changing an analyzer or field type in place expecting it to apply to existing documents, yielding an inconsistent index.
body: Failure mode: a mapping or analyzer is altered on a live index assuming it retroactively re-analyzes documents, but existing docs keep their old terms while new docs use the new analysis, so results are inconsistent and queries behave unpredictably. Detection signals: old and new documents match differently for the same query; mapping update errors or is silently ignored for indexed fields; results changed only for recent data. Do not mutate analysis/mapping in place. Safer fallback: reindex into a new index with the new mapping and swap a read alias atomically, keeping the old index until verified.
